description: This essential three-piece set provides a comprehensive solution for professional stovetop requirements, featuring the 16cm, 18cm, and 20cm Vista draining saucepans. Each unit in this variant is constructed from mirror-polished stainless steel and incorporates the signature double-sided draining lid system, eliminating the need for separate colanders. The set includes three saucepans with matching vented glass lids, all featuring thermic bases for even heat distribution. This specific bundle is ideal for kitchens requiring versatile sizing while maintaining the specific technical advantages of the Vista draining range across multiple burner stations.
features: Material: High-grade stainless steel body with thick hot-forged base; Thermal Distribution: Uniform heat conduction suitable for gas, halogen, ceramic, solid plate, and induction hobs; Lid Construction: Shatter-proof vented glass with stainless steel rim featuring dual-sided draining perforations (variable gauge); Handle Specs: Phenolic low-thermal conductivity handles; Capacity: 16cm, 18cm, and 20cm diameters with internal capacity markings.
uses: Boiling vegetables, reducing sauces, heating liquids, draining pasta or potatoes directly from the pan without a colander, simmering soups.
